criteria.description: Real net.Listener-backed grpc.Server serving the real rpc.Server, with LatencyInterceptor wired via grpc.UnaryInterceptor.
criteria.check: startRealServer helper uses net.Listen("tcp", "127.0.0.1:0") + grpc.NewServer(grpc.UnaryInterceptor(rpc.LatencyInterceptor(...))); post-test assertion on the in-test Recorder confirms RPCMetric records were actually emitted for calls made.

criteria.description: PutSegment (create+append)/GetFile/ReadPartial round-trip correctly against real catalog/content store over real gRPC.
criteria.check: Subtests PutSegment_Create, PutSegment_Append, GetFile, ReadPartial assert response fields and cross-check via direct fixture.cs.Read/ContentStore state.

criteria.description: GraphNeighbors returns correct results against a real graph.CSRGraph.
criteria.check: Subtest GraphNeighbors seeds a real CSR edge via graph.BuildCSR and asserts the wire response's TargetFileId/Type/Weight match the seeded edge.

criteria.description: SearchCandidates returns correct results against a real btree.NodeStore.
criteria.check: Subtest SearchCandidates seeds real B+Tree entries and asserts the wire response matches a direct btree.PrefixScan call on the same store.

criteria.description: GRPCSplitProposer.ProposeSplit against the real (unmodified) server returns codes.Unimplemented, wrapped correctly.
criteria.check: Subtest ProposeSplit_Unimplemented builds split.NewGRPCSplitProposer over the real client conn, asserts non-nil error and status.FromError(err) code == codes.Unimplemented.

criteria.description: Go discipline: gofmt/go vet/go build clean; -race; explicit -timeout.
criteria.check: gofmt -l engine/rpc/integration_test.go (empty output); go vet ./...; go build ./...; go test ./engine/rpc/... -run TestRPCIntegration -race -timeout 60s -v.
